name: Howie Mandel
bio: Howie Mandel is a Canadian stand-up comedian, actor, and television personality whose 1980s act was built on manic, high-energy physical comedy and crowd work. Beyond stand-up he played Dr. Wayne Fiscus on St. Elsewhere, created the cartoon Bobbys World, and later hosted Deal or No Deal and judged Americas Got Talent. He has been candid about living with OCD.

timeline.ev: Creates and stars in the cartoon Bobbys World
Begins hosting Deal or No Deal
Joins Americas Got Talent as a judge

accolades: Ranked No. 82 on Comedy Central 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame and Canadas Walk of Fame

specials.t: Howie Mandel: Live from Carnegie Mall

bits.t: How To Look At Other Women
